summary: Blog Edit Modal Refactoring - All Tests Passed. Backend POST /api/ai/generate-blog-seo returns all 7 fields (seo_title, seo_description, excerpt, tags, seo_keywords, cta_text, cta_microcopy). Blog CRUD supports new fields (featured, cta_text, cta_microcopy). Frontend blog modal in THE DEN tab has 4 tabs (Basics, Content, Media, SEO) matching Armory theme. Generate Blog Post Metadata button opens AI overlay with selectable sections. Apply Selected populates CTA, tags, and SEO fields. Canonical URL and Social Share Image fields correctly removed.

tests: POST /api/blog creates with featured, cta_text, cta_microcopy - PASS
Blog SEO endpoint exists (rejects GET) - PASS

Modal has 4 tabs: Basics, Content, Media, SEO

Content tab: 'Generate Blog Post Metadata' AI button (data-testid='ai-generate-all-btn')

Content tab: Tags editor
Media tab: Cover Image with Upload, Browse Library, and AI Generate buttons

SEO tab: SEO Checklist with validation checks

SEO tab: Social Share Image field correctly REMOVED
AI overlay shows all 7 selectable sections with Apply Selected button
Modal footer: Cancel (left), Create/Update Post (right) - matches Armory style
Creating new post with all fields saves correctly
